sections.heading: (1) This Order may be cited as the Value Added Tax Title and
sections.text:
commence-
(Exemption) (Amendment) Order, 2021, and shall be read as one
ment
with the Value Added Tax (Exemption) Order, 2014, in this Order S.I. No. 68
of 2014
referred to as the principal Order.
(2) This Order shall come into operation on 1st January, 2022.

sections.heading: The Schedule to the principal Order is amended— Amendment
sections.text:
of Schedule
(a) by the deletion of item 4 and the substitution therefor of
the following:

sections.heading: Publications
sections.text:
(a) maps and charts;
(b) journals; and
(b) in item 10, by the deletion of paragraph (b) and the
substitution therefor of the following:
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K4.00 each.
778 Statutory Instruments 31st December, 2021
(b) manufacturing inputs where duty is suspended
under the Customs and Excise (Suspension)
S.I. No. 110 (Manufacturing Inputs) Regulations, 2020,
0f 2020 subject to the same limitations and conditions
that relate to the suspension of the duty and to
such modification as may be specified therein.
DR S. MUSOKOTWANE,
LUSAKA Minister of Finance and
30th December, 2021 National Planning
